title: Section 14
content: The following Acts, namely:-- (a) The Societies Registration Act, 1860 (21 of 1860), (b) The Co-operative Societies Act, 1912 (2 of 1912), 1* * * * * 2[(c) The Companies Act, 1956 (1 of 1956),] shall not apply to any registered Trade Union, and the registration of any such Trade Union under any such Act shall be void.
footnote: 1. Clauses (c) and (d) rep. by Act 25 of 1942, s. 2 and the First Schedule. 2. Subs. by Act 42 of 1960, s. 7, for clause ( e).
